The Bug Bat delivers a powerful electric shock to zap flies, wasps, mosquitoes, and midges on contact, providing quick and effective pest control with just one touch. Our plastic strip blind effectively keeps flying insects at bay, ensuring a pest-free environment while still allowing fresh air to circulate in your home. The mini bug swatter is perfect to use indoors and outdoors, the Bug Bat is ideal for homes, offices, camping trips, BBQs, and picnics, keeping you protected from flying pests in any setting.
